arts.ttl: "We want to get the result that sees us through" - Kompany laser-focused on Leverkusen challenge
arts.sum: Die Rekordmeister's head coach is under no guise ahead of Bayern's second-leg fixture with Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: "We want to win tomorrow" - Goretzka primed for rematch with Leverkusen
arts.sum: The Bavarian's midfielder spoke about tomorrow night's crunch UCL last-16 tie, Florian Wirtz, and his personal contract matters.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane relishing chance for Bayern Munich to show reaction vs. Leverkusen after Bochum loss
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s 125th birthday celebrations at the Allianz Arena were spoiled by the 3-2 loss to VfL Bochum on an occasion where Vincent Kompany made a handful of squad rotations ahead of leg 2 in the Champions League round of 16 against Bayer Leverkusen. After the match, Kane emphasized the focus now shifting to finishing the job against Leverkusen in the Champions League, which is also an opportunity to shake off the frustration from having lost to 16th-placed Bochum at home.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Tottenham and Man Utd 'Set to Miss Out' on Signing Harry Kane
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester United are not on course to land Harry Kane when the transfer window reopens in the summer

arts.ttl: Frimpong expected to leave Leverkusen in summer, Sky reports
arts.sum: The 24-year-old speedster dreams of a move to one of the two biggest clubs in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern "not pushing for sale" of under pressure Palhinha
arts.sum: The Portuguese international is yet to hit the ground running in Bavaria, but the club are taking their time over the 29-year-old's future.

arts.ttl: Jonathan Tah: "We will give everything tomorrow"
arts.sum: Die Werkself's skipper feels ready to face the almighty challenge of overturning Bayern Munich's 3-0 lead in Tuesday night's last-16 second-leg meeting.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, injuries, how to watch and more!
arts.sum: Both Bundesliga matches ended in a draw and Leverkusen knocked out Bayern in the DFB-Pokal. Bayern Munich dominated the first leg with a 3-0 win at the Allianz Arena and will have full control of the second leg until Leverkusen scores at least two goals.

arts.ttl: "Many unexpected things happen in football" - Xabi Alonso issues warning to Bayern
arts.sum: Leverkusen coach Xabi Alonso has sent out a warning to his former club Bayern Munich that their last-16 tie is all but over despite the Bavarians' 3-0 lead.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich XI vs Bayer Leverkusen – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Bayern Munich head to Bayer Leverkusen tonight with one foot in the Champions League quarter-finals. The German giants lead their domestic rivals 3-0 on aggregate, following an accomplished first-leg performance in Munich. Harry Kane scored twice in the first meeting, either side of Jamal Musiala’s goal for Bayern.
